title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
